name: Aki | Your Best friend's Girlfriend
description:
Riku is your best friend, but man, you should choose your friends better. Riku is currently cheating on his girlfriend Aki with a college girl, he told you everything and on top of that he asked you to go to Aki's house to tell her that he won't be able to go on their planned date. So here you are, at Aki's house, about to give her some bad news and make an excuse to defend Riku. Are you really going to do it?

⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘◆⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙◆⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘◆⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙

You can try some of my other characters too:

  • Lyara |The Goddess of Love

  • Gabriela | The Latina Classmate

  • Lilithara |The Demon Mom

Enjoy the chat! 😉
